title: Landscape Worker
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

Since 1985, GreenGarden Integrated Services Pte. Ltd. has been providing exceptional cleaning and landscaping services across Singapore. From commercial cleaning to landscaping maintenance and building upkeep, we take pride in delivering quality, reliability, and outstanding customer service. At GreenGarden, we believe in investing in our people—equipping our staff with the skills, knowledge, and mindset to grow and succeed. Join us and be part of a team that values professionalism, teamwork, and continuous learning. We are proud to be recognized as a BizSAFE Enterprise Level STAR, holders of the Clean Mark Silver Logo, and ISO certified, reflecting our strong commitment to safety, quality, and operational excellence. Take the next step in your career with a company that truly cares—join GreenGarden Integrated Services today!

Job Summary

The Landscape Worker is responsible for maintaining and enhancing the appearance, health, and safety of outdoor spaces. This includes planting, trimming, mowing, and general upkeep of lawns, gardens, and landscaped areas in accordance with the organization’s standards.

Responsibilities

  • Perform routine lawn care by mowing, trimming, and edging to maintain neat outdoor areas
  • Plant, water, fertilize, and care for flowers, shrubs, trees, and other vegetation to support healthy growth
  • Prune and weed plants to improve their health and appearance
  • Clear debris, leaves, and waste from outdoor spaces to ensure cleanliness and safety
  • Operate and maintain landscaping equipment and tools safely to support landscaping tasks
  • Assist with the installation and basic maintenance of irrigation systems to ensure proper watering
  • Follow health and safety protocols consistently to maintain a safe work environment
  • Report hazards, damages, or maintenance issues promptly to supervisors for timely resolution
  • Support special landscaping projects and seasonal tasks as assigned to meet organizational needs

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Knowledge of plants, gardening, and turf management to enhance landscaping quality
  • Ability to operate landscaping machinery safely to perform tasks efficiently
  • Strong work ethic, reliability, and attention to detail to deliver consistent, high-quality results
  • Physically fit to perform manual outdoor work effectively
